name: paper-agent
title: Paper Agent
description: Discover, triage, and manage papers from your local Paper Agent workflow in Raycast.
author: marvel940804836

preferences.name: configPath
preferences.title: Config File Path
preferences.description: Path to the Paper Agent core config.yaml.

preferences.name: paperDir
preferences.title: Paper Directory
preferences.description: Root directory for papers (daily digest and notes). Library is stored under paper_dir/library. Maps to delivery.paper_dir.

preferences.name: pythonPath
preferences.title: Python Executable
preferences.description: Optional override for Python binary (defaults to .venv/bin/python3 in the Paper Agent repo).

preferences.name: recentLimit
preferences.title: Recent Papers Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of papers shown in Recent Papers (used as --limit for the list CLI).

preferences.name: maxPapersPerDay
preferences.title: Max Papers Per Day
preferences.description: Maps to direction.max_papers_per_day in config.yaml.

preferences.name: lookbackDays
preferences.title: Lookback Days
preferences.description: Maps to direction.lookback_days (catch-up window).

preferences.name: keyphrases
preferences.title: Required Keywords
preferences.description: OR match: at least one keyword must appear in title or abstract (not all). Comma-separated; maps to direction.include_keywords.
preferences.placeholder: continual learning, lifelong learning, incremental learning

preferences.name: allowCategories
preferences.title: Allow Categories
preferences.description: Comma-separated arXiv categories to include (maps to direction.allow_categories).

preferences.name: denyCategories
preferences.title: Deny Categories
preferences.description: Comma-separated categories to exclude (maps to direction.deny_categories).

preferences.name: excludeKeywords
preferences.title: Exclude Keywords
preferences.description: Comma-separated keywords; papers matching these are excluded (maps to direction.exclude_keywords).

preferences.name: policyType
preferences.title: Discovery Policy
preferences.description: Off: select by required-keyword match only (title first, then abstract). No scoring policy.

preferences.name: summarizeEnabled
preferences.title: Enable LLM Research Summary
preferences.label: Enable LLM Research Summary
preferences.description: When on, the three options below are used to generate research summaries. When off, they are ignored.

preferences.name: summarizeProvider
preferences.title: Summary Provider
preferences.description: Only used when "Enable LLM research summary" is on. LLM provider (e.g. openai).

preferences.name: summarizeModel
preferences.title: Summary Model
preferences.description: Only used when "Enable LLM research summary" is on. Model name (e.g. gpt-4o-mini).

preferences.name: summarizeLanguage
preferences.title: Summary Language
preferences.description: Only used when "Enable LLM research summary" is on. Maps to summarize.language.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Used for LLM summaries when set. Leave empty to use OPENAI_API_KEY from your environment.

preferences.name: scholarEnabled
preferences.title: Enable Scholar Inbox
preferences.label: Enable Scholar Inbox
preferences.description: Toggle Google Scholar Alerts (email only).

preferences.name: scholarProvider
preferences.title: Scholar Email Provider
preferences.description: Email source for extension runs: imap or gmail.

preferences.name: scholarImapHost
preferences.title: Scholar IMAP Host
preferences.description: IMAP host for Scholar Alerts (e.g. imap.gmail.com).

preferences.name: scholarImapUser
preferences.title: Scholar IMAP User
preferences.description: IMAP user / email for Scholar Alerts.

preferences.name: scholarImapPasswordEnv
preferences.title: Scholar IMAP Password Env Var
preferences.description: Environment variable name for IMAP password (e.g. IMAP_PASSWORD).

preferences.name: scholarImapPassword
preferences.title: Scholar IMAP Password
preferences.description: Optional. If set, used as the IMAP password (env var name above). All whitespace is removed, so Google app passwords work whether pasted with or without spaces. Leave empty to use the value from your environment.

preferences.name: scholarGmailLabel
preferences.title: Scholar Gmail Label
preferences.description: Gmail label/mailbox to read (e.g. scholar-alerts).

preferences.name: scholarFromAddresses
preferences.title: Scholar From Addresses
preferences.description: Comma-separated sender addresses to filter (e.g. scholaralerts-noreply@google.com). Empty = no filter.

commands.name: today-papers
commands.title: Browse Today's Papers
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Show today's papers from your local Paper Agent workflow and open notes or paper links.

commands.name: recent-papers
commands.title: Browse Recent Papers
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Show recently discovered papers from your Paper Agent library.

commands.name: search-papers
commands.title: Search Papers
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Search papers in your local library by title, authors, summary, and more.

commands.name: favorite-papers
commands.title: Browse Favorite Papers
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Open papers you have added to favorites from the Paper Agent extension.

commands.name: reading-queue
commands.title: Browse Reading Queue
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Open papers you have added to your reading queue from the Paper Agent extension.

commands.name: run-pipeline
commands.title: Run Paper Pipeline
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Runs the full Paper Agent pipeline with Raycast Preferences applied at runtime (overriding runtime YAML fields), then updates local notes, library JSON, and daily/weekly digests.

commands.name: install-daily-schedule
commands.title: Install Daily Schedule
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Installs or updates a macOS launchd job that runs Paper Agent daily at 04:00 and catches up after boot/login if missed.

commands.name: remove-daily-schedule
commands.title: Remove Daily Schedule
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Unloads and removes the macOS launchd job for the daily Paper Agent run while keeping logs and status history.

commands.name: check-run-status
commands.title: Check Run Status
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Shows run status for both scheduled (launchd) and manual runs: whether the daily schedule is installed, today's result, last successful day, and the most recent run metadata with actions to open log or state directory.

commands.name: open-paper-repo
commands.title: Open Paper Directory
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Opens the Paper directory folder from Preferences in Finder.

commands.name: open-config-directory
commands.title: Open Config Directory
commands.subtitle: Paper Agent
commands.description: Opens the folder that contains your config.yaml (the core repo root) in Finder.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
